title: oberna aeoniopsis
intro: Oberna aeoniopsis, also known as the Common Oberna, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, Oberna aeoniopsis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. Oberna aeoniopsis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
